creator: papowell@astart.com
text:
Updated port www/p5-CGI.pm to CGI.pm version 3.50.
Update the pgk-plist to fix errors reported by portline

Fix: 

diff www/p5-CGI.pm/Makefile /usr/ports/www/p5-CGI.pm/Makefile
9c9
< PORTVERSION=	3.50
---
> PORTVERSION=	3.49
diff www/p5-CGI.pm/distinfo /usr/ports/www/p5-CGI.pm/distinfo
1,2c1,3
< SHA256 (CGI.pm-3.50.tar.gz) = 63095e54d44478e9ed783f7be3c74bb8d3c90515dc858ed8303ddfc17621e9d1
< SIZE (CGI.pm-3.50.tar.gz) = 242347
---
> MD5 (CGI.pm-3.49.tar.gz) = c485cedf1033de838598b21db439600c
> SHA256 (CGI.pm-3.49.tar.gz) = 4a136457d0387f96b8f084c5e4c2d92e87df0cfde9fe57d504569f9a39837fca
> SIZE (CGI.pm-3.49.tar.gz) = 241762
